titleStmt.title: SII 29.48: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 48. (A.R. No. B. 766 of 1962-63.) GORṬA, BHALKI TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On three faces of a pillar lying in front of the Hanumān temple.

The top portion of the pillar is broken and lost. It has caused loss of information also. It states that the king Tribhuvanamalladēva was ruling from his capital Kalyāṇapura. At the time of the record the king was stationed at the camp Ghaṭṭada-Bōrīhaḷḷa. It was probably a subsidiary capital for, in the record it is mentioned as bīḍu. Here the king performed several kratus [religious functions] for his personal merit. At the end the king gave the village Hulicheṟu as dakshiṇā to his preceptor Rudramiśra. It is stated that the village Hulicheṟu was situated in Bhaluṅke-86, a kaṁpaṇa of Mēlaṭṭaḷi.

It is said that the preceptor Rudramiśra was the son of Gōvardhana-bhaṭṭa and his wife Arasikabbe of Vasiśṭha-vaṁśa. The family is eulogized at the beginning of the record. The record states that Rudramiśra made over the village through a copper-plate grant the village Hulicheṟu so received from the king as a gift to the god Rudrēśvaradēva installed by him at agrahāra Gōranṭe for worship, offerings and various services to the god and in the temple and for feeding and clothing the ascetics, teachers and students there in. This indicates that the temple was also a centre of education.

Further gifts to the same deity probably made by the authorities of Goranṭe [Gōranṭe prabhutva] of land, income from taxes like tippesuṅka, an oil mill for the perpetual lamp etc., are also registered in the record. The temple servants such as, Kētabōva, the mason and Bhāśōja, the smith received a house site each.

The date portion is a little damaged. It states • • • • • • • • • • bhi, Kārttika amāvāsye, Tuesday. If the truncated letter • • • bhi is taken to mean the cyclic year Dundubhi then probably the given tithi corresponds to 1082 A.D., November 22, Tuesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vēdadādya palara naranātharu rā
madēna lunnatiyane gaddaṁ jaya
māpāḷara paḍitamanāṟeya cāritra
khidakaḷu śaḍvarggaṁ kūḍi nimāḷisu
ḷeseyararā cakramaṁ vikramaṁ pāḷisutaṁ cā
da niḷāsi permmāḍidēva . svasti samasta bhuvanā
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
ru kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrī matri
vijaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddha
rkatāraṁ saluttamire śrī rājadhāni kalyāṇapura
sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadi rājyaṁgeyyutta mirṛdu .
nāḷdā kuntaḷa narapatige kāvesa
da śvikśrīkāntannegaḻdiḻdaurudramiśra maha
varunnatavaṁ paḍadoṁdavatāra madente nalke
nirppava hariya nā(nō) kamaḷōdsavanāgi
naka nāda brahma . Ā padmōdbhava vaśaṁ sōpānu
(ne)ne nikhiḷa jagadvyāpaka narunnati pramadā patiya
śiṣṭha nāggoṁśraṣṭha . Antenipa vaśiṣṭharava(ṁ) śaṁnta mmanvaya
su caritradi nōḷpaṁntaḷapu rudrabhaṭṭa mahantara śrī bāgavā
yoḷānegaḻde ḻdaurō . Ene negaḻdau rudrabhaṭṭara tanūbhava rbhuva
na doḷe virājisi gōvarddhana bhaṭṭōpādhyāyarjjananutarādarjjaga ke
jasamesevinega . vaddhana mā(ytu) tammaṁ vimaḷaśrutadiṁ śruti
getuḷaṁkrātaṁ varddhanamāytu tamasūvarittrādinukṣrīge saccari
tamuṁ vaddhānamāytu tamaguṇadiṁ dvija sadguṇa kōḷvanaṁ gō
varddhana bhaṭṭaralte negaḻdiḻdaraya (dā)ttariḷā taḷāgradoḷ . gōva
rddhana bhaṭṭargge gāminiyandaḷanipavadu vesedaḷā nāsīgu (ni)
samētega liḷāgāmi . nelarasikabbe vanitāratna .
ḷe samāna menisirpparasayyagavā guṇatthrī gōvarddhana bhaṭṭa vipra
varagaṁ muda muṇmire rudramiśrarivāddhi vitābi gōḷbamige
luddadaraggada tarddhavāḍi siṁvaddinī bhōgapāḍiya kuṁbhēśvara dē
va varaprasādadi . Aṁgaja verikoṭṭa baradiṁdame puṭṭi sama
sta bhūtaḷakaṁ gajarāja vairiyabhidāna manāntu viśiṣṭa
mappa yajñaṁgaḷa niḻdārāgvi bhavadiṁ pariraṁjisi cakrava
rttigaḷayyagaḷanippa paṁpu vaḍedaḻdāre yādvibhu rudrami
śrarōḷ .

rapari
nnubi
śrita
effaced
ladaḍa bhi
vatsarada kārttikadamāvāsye
maṁgaḷavāradaṁdu ghaṭṭada bōri
haḷḷada bīḍinalu śrī matribhuva
namalla dēvaru halamahā
(kra)tugaḷaṁ māḍi A(da)ṟa dakṣiṇā
kāladalli dēvabhogavāgi mēla
ṭṭaḷiya kaṁpaṇa bhaluṁki Eṁbhatta
Āṟaṟa baḷiya bāḍa huliceṟu
grāmamaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtara sahita
pūrvaprasiddha sīmeyiṁ kuḍala
taṁmagrahāraṁ goraṁṭeyalu mā
ḍisida śrī rudrēśvaradēvarige Aṁ
gabhōgakaṁ gītavādya nityakaṁ pāda
mūḷa parivārakkaṁ tapōdhana(ru)pā
dhyāya cchātra kaśanācchādanakaṁ
khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrnnōddhārakaṁ satraka(ṁ) pu
ḍigegaṁ Aggiṣṭagegaṁ tāṁbra śāsanaṁ bara
si paḍadu koṭṭaru . mattaṁ goraṁṭeya
prabhutvada guḍḍe mānyaṁ sāsira(da)

nakenuya gikka
vodagi Aḍḍavoṁdu biṭi
ḷa tippe suṁka vellavaḻaddaṁ dēvari
naṁdādīvigege gāṇavāyileya
(ka) vānadoḷage sollage Oṁdu dēva(ra)
baḍagaṇa parisūtraṁ modalāgi ku(ṁ)
bhēśvaravaṁ muṭṭi mūḍadēvara tō
ṭavaṁ muṭṭi(le) kalluḍige gēriyāṁdha
rmma vōjarige Āraṁggākēriyiṁ mūḍa
teṁkaluṁ mūḍalu dēvara tōṭaṁ mēreyā
gi tōṭa koṁḍuHere some 4 lines of writing space is left vacant.
© bahubhirvva sudhā dattā rājabhi
sagarādhibhiḥ yasya yasya ya
dā bhūmi stasya tasya tadāphalaṁ .
© svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harē
tu vasuṁdharā(r) . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa saha
śrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
© suvarṇa mēkaṁ gāmēkaṁ bhūmēra
paikamaṁgulaṁ . haraṁ naraka māpnō
tiyāvadā bhūta saṁ(ṣṭa)vaṁ . —
© sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpā
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhava
dbhiḥ sarbbānētānbāvinaḥ pārtthi(vēṁ)
drā nbhūyō bhūyō yācate
rāmacaṁdraḥ . madvaṁśajaḥ parama
hīpati vaṁśaja vāpāpādādapēta
mana sābhuvi bhūvi pālāyō
pālayaṁti mamadharmma mi(ma)
samastaṁ tēbhyō mayāṁ dārabhi
tāṁjali vēṣa mūrdni . © © ©
dēvarige kelasa māḍidaṇba Oḍḍa kē
tabōvaṁge sarbamānyaṁ nivēśanavoṁdu ka
māṟa bhāṣōjage nivēśanavoṁdu .
Digital edition of SII 29.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
